programmes.show_name: Gangster: The Story of Georgie Pai
programmes.show_description: Police in Southampton uncover Georgie Pai's protection racket. He's deported back to Hong Kong, but even in exile, he continues pulling the strings.

programmes.show_name: Gangster: The Story of Georgie Pai
programmes.show_description: Georgie Pai returns to Britain to grow his Triad empire. Manchester becomes his nerve centre as machete attacks and bloody turf wars erupt nationwide.
